title: GATE-04 closure - Cross-Process Lineage Locking
change_summary: GATE-04 declared CLOSED after CIC-TEST-REPORT-GATE-04-R2 passed all 8 process-level cases on NTFS, including contention, timeout, stale-lock recovery, crash repair, hash verification, and ten-process stress.
decision_note: Tier 1 ratified Gate-04 closure on 2026-07-14. Closure does not activate governance runtime or close any other gate.
